problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Dopamine/serotonin. Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
